name: os-control-mcp
description: The sanctioned OS motor cortex for an agent on a Linux box: control systemd services/timers, query journald, read host resources/processes, send desktop notifications, drive D-Bus, and manage power — via systemctl/loginctl/journalctl/busctl, never raw PID hacks. Pure-stdlib, zero pip deps. A self-preservation guard refuses severing actions on units the agent depends on. Ships the MCP server + a control-os skill.
